name: wintertoo
documentation:
# wintertoo
[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/wintertoo.svg)](https://badge.fury.io/py/wintertoo)
[![CI](https://github.com/winter-telescope/wintertoo/actions/workflows/continuous_integration.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/winter-telescope/wintertoo/actions/workflows/continuous_integration.yml) 
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/winter-telescope/wintertoo/badge.svg?branch=main)](https://coveralls.io/github/winter-telescope/wintertoo?branch=main) 

General package for Target-of-Opportunity (ToO) observations with the [WINTER observatory](https://github.com/winter-telescope). 

Current functionality includes:
* Converting RA/DEC positions to fields
* Building ToO schedules
* Verifying ToO schedules

## Installation
### Install from pypi
```bash
pip install wintertoo
```

### Install from source
```bash
git clone git@github.com:winter-telescope/wintertoo.git
cd wintertoo
pip install --editable ".[dev]"
pre-commit install
```

Created on Tue Jan 25 13:51:59 2022
@author: frostig, belatedly edited by Robert Stein

-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: wintertoo.utils.get_alt_az
documentation:
Get alt and az for a target at various times in decimal degrees
\:param times_mjd: list of times
\:param ra: ra
\:param dec: dec
\:return: alt array, and az array

functions.name: wintertoo.utils.up_tonight
documentation:
what is up (above altitude 20 deg) in a given night?
date in MJD (median Julian Date), e.g. 59480 (Sept 23)
ra (right ascension) in hours, minutes, seconds, e.g. '+19h50m41s'
dec (declination) in hours, minutes, seconds, e.g. '+08d50m58s'
\:param time_mjd: time in mjd
\:param ra: ra of target
\:param dec: dec of target
\:return:

functions.name: wintertoo.utils.get_date
documentation:
Get the date from a time object

```
param time

Time object

return

date as an integer
```

documentation: Module handling submission of ToO schedules

functions.name: wintertoo.submit.get_db_file_name
documentation:
Function to get the name of a database file

```
param program_name

Name of program

param date

Date to use

return

String of database file name
```

documentation:
Function to export a schedule to an sqlite db file

```
param schedule

schedule to export

param base_save_path

directory to save to

return

None
```

functions.name: wintertoo.submit.submit_schedule
documentation:
Function to validate, and then optionally submit, a schedule

```
param schedule

schedule to use

param program_api_key

API key of program

param program_name

Program name (e.g 2020A000)

param program_db_name

Name of program DB

param program_db_host

Host of programs DB

param program_db_user

User of programs DB

param program_db_password

password of programs DB

param save_path

save path

param submit_trigger

boolean for whether to actually submit a trigger

return

None
```

modules.name: wintertoo.fields
documentation: Module for handling field-related functions

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.get_fields
documentation:
Get field table for either summer or winter
\:param summer: boolean whether to use summer grid
\:return: field dataframe

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.get_base_width
documentation:
Get base width of field
\:param summer: boolean whether to use summer (or winter)
\:return: width in deg

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.get_field_info
documentation:
Get info from field table for a particular field ID
\:param field_id: ID of field
\:param summer: boolean whether to use summer field table
\:return: Series for matching field

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.get_fields_in_box
documentation:
Return all fields within a particular rectangle
\:param ra_lim: tuple of lower, upper RA values
\:param dec_lim: tuple of lower, upper dec values
\:param summer: boolean to use SUMMER grid rather than WINTER
\:return: dataframe of fields within the rectangle

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.get_overlapping_fields
documentation:
Get all fields overlapping a particular RA/dec
\:param ra_deg: Ra
\:param dec_deg: dec
\:param summer: boolean whether to use summer field grid
\:return: dataframe of overlapping fields

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.plot_field_rectangles
documentation:
Function to plot field contours
\:param ax: axis
\:param field_df: dataframe of fields
\:param color: color for the field edge color
\:param summer: Boolean whether to use summer field grid
\:return: None

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.plot_overlapping_fields
documentation:
Plot summer fields overlapping a given ra/dex
\:param field_df: field dataframe
\:param ra_deg: ra
\:param dec_deg: dec
\:param summer: boolean whether to use summer field grid
\:param closest: the closest field
\:return: ax

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.get_best_field
documentation:
Get the 'best' summer field for a given ra/dec,
where best is defined as the field with a center closest to the value
\:param ra_deg: ra
\:param dec_deg: dec
\:param summer: boolean whether to use summer field grid
\:param make_plot: make a plot of the overlap
\:return: best field

functions.name: wintertoo.fields.plot_fields
documentation:
Plot fields within a rectangle
\:param field_df: dataframe of fields
\:param ra_lim: tuple of lower, upper ra values
\:param dec_lim: tuple of lower, upper dec values
\:return: Matplotlib ax

Database name

Engine

Get details of chosen program

modules.name: wintertoo.validate
documentation: Module for validating ToO requests

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.get_and_validate_program_details
documentation:
Get details of chosen program
\:param program_name: Name of program (e.g. 2020A001)
\:param program_api_key: program api key
\:param program_db_user: user of program database
\:param program_db_password: password of program database
\:param program_db_host: host of program database
\:param program_db_name: name of database containing program table
\:return: dataframe of program

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_schedule_json
documentation:
Validates that a schedule json matches the ToO database schema.
Returns nothing, but raises an error if needed.
\:param data: data to validate
\:return: None

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_schedule_df
documentation:
Validate a schedule dataframe
\:param df: dataframe
\:return: None

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_target_visibility
documentation:
Validate that requested targets in a schedule are visible.
Returns nothing, but raises errors as required.
\:param schedule: Schedule to check
\:return: None

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_obshist
documentation:
Ensures that each entry in a schedule has a unique obsHistID, starting at 0.

```
param schedule

Schedule to test

return

None
```

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_target_priority
documentation:
Validates the priority assigned to each target does not exceed
the maximum allowed for the particular program. If not, raises an error.
\:param schedule: schedule to check
\:param max_priority: base priority of program
\:return: None.

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_filter
documentation:
Validates that the chosen filters are indeed SUMMER filters. Not case-sensitive.
\:param filter_name: name of filter
\:return:

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_target_pi
documentation:
Validate that the program PI matches recorded PI of program.
Raises an error if not.
\:param schedule: Schedule to check
\:param prog_pi: true program PI
\:return: None.

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_target_dates
documentation:
Validates that the chosen start/stop time for a target are acceptable.
This includes that the program is still throughout,
and that the start time is before the end time.
Raises an error if not.
\:param schedule: Schedule to check
\:param program_start_date: start date of program
\:param program_end_date: end date of program
\:return: None

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_time_allocation
documentation:
Validates that the hours used in the schedule do not exceed hours allocated

```
param schedule

Schedule to check

param hours_allocated

hours allocated to the program

param hours_used

hours used by the program

return

None
```

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_schedule_with_program
documentation:
Big function to validate a schedule request against a program.

```
param schedule_request

Schedule to validate

param program

Program to validate against

return

None
```

functions.name: wintertoo.validate.validate_schedule_request
documentation:
Central to validate that a schedule request is allowed.
Raises an error if not.

```
param schedule_request

Schedule to validate

param program_name

name of program e.g 2020A000

param program_api_key

unique API key for program

param program_db_name

name of the programs database

param program_db_user

user for the programs database

param program_db_password

password for the programs database

param program_db_host

host of the programs database

return

None
```
